setup.name: lands-app
setup.context: Lands is a SaaS landing-page builder where users create personal pages ('lands') composed of ordered, polymorphic sections. Users customise sections, theme presets, and publish to a .lands.app subdomain, with support for team collaboration, e-commerce, email campaign integrations, and custom domains.

files.name: App
files.description: Root Vue component that initialises auth/user state, wires theme CSS variables via useThemeVars, and renders the RouterView with a global BaseToastContainer.

files.name: main
files.description: App entry point: creates the Vue app, installs Pinia and Vue Router, and mounts to #app.

files.name: AppLayout
files.description: Primary dashboard shell that renders AppHeader, a scrollable RouterView content area, and a teleported PlanModal.

files.name: AuthLayout
files.description: Two-column authentication shell with a branding/logo panel on the left and a RouterView form panel on the right.

files.name: OnboardingLayout
files.description: Minimal single-column layout wrapper used during new-user onboarding flow.

files.name: LoginView
files.description: Email/password login form with links to the register and forgot-password flows.

files.name: RegisterView
files.description: Account registration form collecting name, email, and password.

files.name: LostPasswordView
files.description: Sends a password-reset email via Supabase OTP and shows a confirmation state.

files.name: StripeCallbackView
files.description: Handles Stripe Connect OAuth callback, exchanges the code via stripeService.handleCallback, then redirects to the dashboard.

files.name: AcceptInviteView
files.description: Processes a collaborator invite token via collaboratorService.acceptInvite and redirects to the dashboard.

files.name: ProjectView
files.description: Main editor/preview page composing LandsDashboard, EditorPreview, and the EditorSidebar side-by-side.

files.name: AccountView
files.description: User profile settings page for updating name, avatar, email, and deleting the account.

files.name: PlansView
files.description: Subscription selection page listing free vs paid tiers with Stripe Checkout integration.

files.name: PlansSuccessView
files.description: Post-upgrade confirmation page shown after a successful Stripe Checkout session.

files.name: SupportView
files.description: Help and support resources page with links and documentation for users.

files.name: CheckoutSuccessView
files.description: Post-purchase confirmation page shown after a successful product checkout.

files.name: CheckoutCancelView
files.description: Purchase cancellation page shown when a user abandons the Stripe checkout flow.

files.name: HomeView
files.description: Marketing homepage view composing MainHeader, HomeHero, FeaturesSection, ShowcaseSection, CardsSection, and PricingSection.

files.name: LandsUnpublishedView
files.description: Informational page shown when a visitor navigates to a land that has not yet been published.

files.name: OnboardingView
files.description: Multi-step new-user wizard that collects handle, purpose, and theme preferences before creating the first land.

files.name: AppHeader
files.description: Top dashboard header with the BaseMenu project switcher, edit-mode toggle, save/publish/discard buttons, and integrations shortcut.

files.name: LandsLoading
files.description: Full-screen animated loading spinner shown while the app bootstraps or switches projects.

files.name: OnboardingTour
files.description: Overlay onboarding guide that highlights key UI areas with tooltips to orient new users.

files.name: LandsDashboard
files.description: Left-panel project list that lets users switch between lands and open dashboard detail tabs (analytics, orders, campaign, sell).

files.name: AnalyticsDetail
files.description: Analytics detail panel showing a page-view BaseChart and key visit metrics for the active land.

files.name: CampaignDetail
files.description: Campaign integration detail panel for connecting and managing an email provider on the active land.

files.name: MonetizeDetail
files.description: Memberships/monetization detail panel for configuring paid-access tiers on the active land.

files.name: OrdersDetail
files.description: Orders detail panel listing purchase history for products sold via the active land's store.

files.name: SellDetail
files.description: Selling settings panel for connecting Stripe and configuring product delivery options.

files.name: EditorPreview
files.description: Renders the active land's ordered sections via a SectionType→component map, handles section selection and right-click context menu in edit mode.

files.name: EditorSidebar
files.description: Design settings panel with tabs for the sections tree (drag-to-reorder), theme (colours, fonts, preset), and land settings (handle, images, domain, delete).

files.name: LandsPreview
files.description: Read-only public preview of a land that renders all sections without edit-mode interactivity.

files.name: MobileEditorBar
files.description: Mobile-only bottom toolbar providing quick access to section settings, theme sidebar, and publish action.

files.name: SectionSettings
files.description: Section-specific settings sidebar that renders the correct settings sub-component (HeaderSettings, ListSettings, etc.) based on the active section type.

files.name: ContentEditor
files.description: TipTap-based rich-text editor supporting bold/italic formatting, images, audio, video, and file block extensions.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: HTML string content bound via v-model.

files.name: RichTextEditor
files.description: Simple TipTap StarterKit editor wrapper with bold/italic toolbar, bound via v-model.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: HTML string content bound via v-model.

files.name: AudioBlock
files.description: TipTap Node extension defining a custom audio-block node type for the rich-text editor.

files.name: AudioBlockView
files.description: TipTap NodeView component that renders an inline audio player for AudioBlock nodes.

files.name: FileBlock
files.description: TipTap Node extension defining a custom file-block node type for downloadable file attachments.

files.name: FileBlockView
files.description: TipTap NodeView component that renders a downloadable file attachment row for FileBlock nodes.

files.name: VideoBlock
files.description: TipTap Node extension defining a custom video-block node type for embedded video content.

files.name: VideoBlockView
files.description: TipTap NodeView component that renders an inline video player or iframe embed for VideoBlock nodes.

files.name: CampaignSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for the campaign section: style variant, call-to-action copy, and provider setup shortcut.

files.name: CollectionItemContentSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for editing a single collection item's title, image, description, and URL.

files.name: CollectionSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for managing collections and their items within a collection section.

files.name: ContentMediaSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for the content-media section: layout variant, media upload (image/video), and text content.

files.name: FooterSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for the footer section's nav links, social icons, and copyright text.

files.name: HeaderSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for the header section's profile photo, cover media, bio text, and profile-photo position.

files.name: HeaderDefaultSettings
files.description: Sub-panel for the default/baseline header variant settings.

files.name: HeaderMinimalSettings
files.description: Sub-panel for the minimal header variant settings.

files.name: HeaderStructureSettings
files.description: Sub-panel for the structure header variant settings.

files.name: FooterDefaultSettings
files.description: Sub-panel for the default footer variant settings.

files.name: FooterMinimalSettings
files.description: Sub-panel for the minimal footer variant settings.

files.name: ItemEditorSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for a store product item: title, price, description, image, and variants.

files.name: ListSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for managing link items (add, edit, reorder, delete) within a list section.

files.name: MonetizeSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for configuring membership tiers and pricing in a monetize section.

files.name: SetupCampaignSettings
files.description: Step-by-step panel for connecting an email campaign provider (Kit, Loops, Brevo, etc.) to the active land.

files.name: StoreSettings
files.description: Editor settings panel for managing store products, variants, and store layout in a store section.

files.name: CampaignPanel
files.description: Integration panel for selecting and configuring the active land's email campaign provider.

files.name: CollaboratorsPanel
files.description: Integration panel for managing team collaborators: invite, change role, remove, resend invite.

files.name: QrCodePanel
files.description: Integration panel that generates and displays a QR code for the active land's public URL.

files.name: SeoPanel
files.description: Integration panel for editing the active land's SEO metadata (title, description, social image).

files.name: StorePanel
files.description: Integration panel for configuring store-level settings such as currency and Stripe product sync.

files.name: ConfirmDeleteAccountModal
files.description: Modal dialog that asks the user to confirm permanent account deletion before calling userService.deleteAccount.

files.name: ConfirmLeaveModal
files.description: Modal dialog warning about unsaved changes when navigating away from the editor.

files.name: ConfirmPublishedModal
files.description: Modal dialog shown after a successful publish operation with a link to the live land URL.

files.name: ConfirmRemoveCollaboratorModal
files.description: Modal dialog confirming removal of a collaborator from the active land.

files.name: ConfirmUnpublishModal
files.description: Modal dialog confirming the user wants to take their land offline.

files.name: CreateProjectModal
files.description: Modal dialog for creating a new land: collects the handle/slug and calls landService.createLand.

files.name: CustomDomainModal
files.description: Modal dialog for connecting, verifying, and disconnecting a custom domain on the active land.

files.name: DeleteProjectModal
files.description: Modal dialog that confirms deletion of the active land, calls landService.deleteLand, then redirects.

files.name: IntegrationSettingsModal
files.description: Modal dialog for configuring a specific integration (campaign provider settings form).

files.name: IntegrationsModal
files.description: Hub modal listing all available integrations (collaborators, SEO, QR, store, campaign, custom domain) as entry points.

files.name: InviteAcceptModal
files.description: Modal dialog shown to an authenticated user accepting a pending collaborator invite.

files.name: InviteCollaboratorModal
files.description: Modal dialog for inviting a new team member by email with a role selector (admin/editor).

files.name: PlanModal
files.description: Paywall upgrade modal showing paid plan benefits and linking to Stripe Checkout.

files.name: SectionsModal
files.description: Modal dialog presenting available section types for the user to add to their land.

files.name: SettingsModal
files.description: Modal dialog wrapping all land-level settings (handle, title, images, visibility).

files.name: ShareModal
files.description: Modal dialog with public land URL, copy-link button, and sharing options.

files.name: StripeConnectedModal
files.description: Modal dialog confirming that Stripe Connect was successfully linked to the active land.

files.name: SectionCampaign
files.description: Campaign section router that selects CampaignMinimal, CampaignBaseline, or CampaignStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The campaign section data including content, settings_json, and style_variant.

files.name: SectionCollection
files.description: Collection section router that selects CollectionMinimal, CollectionBaseline, or CollectionStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The collection section data including collections array in content.

files.name: SectionContentMedia
files.description: Content-media section router that selects ContentMediaMinimal, ContentMediaBaseline, or ContentMediaStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The content-media section data with text content and media settings.

files.name: SectionFooter
files.description: Footer section router that selects FooterMinimal, FooterBaseline, or FooterStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The footer section data including links and social icons.

files.name: SectionHeader
files.description: Header section router that selects HeaderMinimal, HeaderBaseline, or HeaderStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The header section data including profile photo, cover, and bio.

files.name: SectionList
files.description: List section router that selects ListMinimal, ListBaseline, or ListStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The list section data including the items array.

files.name: SectionMedia
files.description: Media section router that selects MediaMinimal, MediaBaseline, or MediaStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The media section data including image/video URL and caption.

files.name: SectionMonetize
files.description: Monetize section router that selects MonetizeMinimal, MonetizeBaseline, or MonetizeStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The monetize section data including membership tiers.

files.name: SectionStore
files.description: Store section router that selects StoreMinimal or StoreStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The store section data including products and variants.

files.name: SectionText
files.description: Text section router that selects TextMinimal, TextBaseline, or TextStructure based on the active theme preset.

props.name: section
props.description: The text section data including rich-text body content.

files.description: Minimal-theme variant of the text section rendering a prose block with default/centered/wide alignment.

files.name: LandsLogo
files.description: SVG Lands logotype component used in the AppHeader and AuthLayout.

files.name: HomeHero
files.description: Marketing homepage hero section with headline, sub-copy, CTA button, and product screenshot.

files.name: MainHeader
files.description: Storefront top navigation bar with logo, nav links, and sign-up/login CTA.

files.name: FeaturesSection
files.description: Marketing features grid showcasing key product capabilities with icons and copy.

files.name: PricingSection
files.description: Marketing pricing section displaying free and paid plan cards with feature lists.

files.name: ShowcaseSection
files.description: Marketing showcase section displaying example lands/portfolios built with the product.

files.name: CardsSection
files.description: Marketing section displaying feature or use-case cards in a responsive grid layout.

files.name: Accordion
files.description: Animated collapsible section with a labelled trigger button and smooth max-height transition.

props.name: label
props.description: Text label shown in the accordion header button.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls whether the accordion is open; can only be closed from outside.

files.name: BaseAvatar
files.description: User avatar with file-picker upload button; displays initials when no image URL is provided.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: URL of the current avatar image.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text used to derive initials fallback.

props.name: size
props.description: Avatar display size.

files.name: BaseBadge
files.description: Inline status badge with colour variants and optional dot indicator.

props.name: variant
props.description: Colour scheme of the badge.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the badge text and padding.

props.name: dot
props.description: When true, shows a coloured dot before the label.

files.name: BaseButton
files.description: Multi-variant button with ghost, outline, solid, icon, and remove styles; supports loading spinner.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant.

props.name: size
props.description: Button size affecting padding and font size.

props.name: active
props.description: Applies active/pressed background state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button and applies not-allowed cursor.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinning loader and disables interaction.

files.name: BaseCard
files.description: Section card container with an optional icon, title, description, header-action slot, and actions slot.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon component shown in the card header.

props.name: title
props.description: Card heading text.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional description rendered in the card body.

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout/colour variant of the card.

files.name: BaseChart
files.description: Animated SVG line chart with area fill and x-axis labels; draws on mount with a CSS stroke-dashoffset animation.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of { label, value } data points to plot.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke and fill colour of the chart line.

props.name: height
props.description: SVG height in pixels.

files.name: BaseColorInput
files.description: Colour swatch trigger that opens a teleported BaseColorPicker popover; emits the selected hex colour.

props.name: label
props.description: Label displayed beside the colour swatch.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Current hex colour value.

files.name: BaseColorPicker
files.description: Floating palette of 15 preset hex colours; emits the selected colour on click.

files.name: BaseContextMenu
files.description: Right-click context menu with edit, duplicate, move-up, move-down, and delete actions for a section.

props.name: x
props.description: Horizontal position of the menu in viewport pixels.

props.name: y
props.description: Vertical position of the menu in viewport pixels.

props.name: locked
props.description: When true, hides all actions except Edit (used for header/footer).

props.name: canMoveUp
props.description: Enables the Move Up action.

props.name: canMoveDown
props.description: Enables the Move Down action.

files.name: BaseDropdown
files.description: Labelled inline dropdown that shows a list of string options in a floating panel.

props.name: label
props.description: Label shown to the left of the trigger button.

props.name: options
props.description: List of option strings to display.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Currently selected option value.

files.name: BaseDropdownMenu
files.description: Ellipsis-triggered dropdown menu that renders a list of DropdownMenuItem actions with optional icons and danger styling.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of menu items each with label, optional icon, danger flag, and action callback.

files.name: BaseFont
files.description: Font-pair selector button that previews title and body fonts loaded from Google Fonts.

props.name: label
props.description: Display name of the font pairing.

props.name: titleFont
props.description: CSS font-family value for the title sample text.

props.name: bodyFont
props.description: CSS font-family value for the body sample text.

props.name: titleGoogleFont
props.description: Google Fonts name to load for the title font.

props.name: bodyGoogleFont
props.description: Google Fonts name to load for the body font.

props.name: active
props.description: Highlights the button as selected.

files.name: BaseIconPicker
files.description: Icon/image picker supporting none, Lucide icon grid with search, or image upload modes; emits separate v-model events for iconType, iconName, and imageUrl.

props.name: iconType
props.description: Currently active icon mode.

props.name: iconName
props.description: Name of the selected Lucide icon.

props.name: imageUrl
props.description: URL of the uploaded icon image.

files.name: BaseInput
files.description: Versatile form input supporting text, email, password (with show/hide toggle), slug (with .lands.app suffix), and textarea types.

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the input field.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Bound value via v-model.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text.

props.name: type
props.description: Input variant; password adds a visibility toggle, slug appends .lands.app.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls font size and padding.

files.name: BaseItem
files.description: Row item with an optional icon thumbnail, title, description, optional action button, and grab/click modes.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon component shown in the item thumbnail.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary text label.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary text shown below the title.

props.name: action
props.description: Label for an optional action button shown on the right.

props.name: clickable
props.description: Renders as a button element and emits click.

props.name: grab
props.description: Shows grab cursor and scale-up hover effect for drag handles.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls padding and icon/text sizes.

files.name: BaseLinkPicker
files.description: Dual-field input (label + URL) with a dropdown for typing a custom URL or picking a section anchor link.

props.name: label
props.description: Current link label text.

props.name: url
props.description: Current link URL or #section: anchor.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder for the label input.

files.name: BaseMenu
files.description: Project-switcher dropdown menu showing all user lands, nav links (Account, Plans, Support), and a Logout button.

files.name: BaseModal
files.description: Centred modal overlay with configurable max-width, padding, and overlay darkness; closes on backdrop click.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Tailwind max-width class for the modal card.

props.name: padding
props.description: Tailwind padding class for the modal card.

props.name: overlay
props.description: Overlay background shade; dark uses bg-black/20.

files.name: BasePlanGate
files.description: Paywall blocker component showing a lock icon, title, description, and an Upgrade CTA that opens the PlanModal.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading text explaining the gated feature.

props.name: description
props.description: Sub-copy describing what the upgrade unlocks.

files.name: BaseProject
files.description: Project row button showing cover thumbnail, title, URL, and plan badge (Free/Pro); used in the BaseMenu switcher.

props.name: title
props.description: Land display title.

props.name: url
props.description: Public URL shown as sub-label.

props.name: image
props.description: Cover image URL for the thumbnail.

props.name: active
props.description: Highlights the row as the currently selected project.

props.name: plan
props.description: Renders a Free or Pro badge.

files.name: BaseSelect
files.description: Labelled native select element with sm/md/lg size variants, bound via v-model.

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the select.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Currently selected value.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of option objects to render.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls font size and padding.

files.name: BaseSwitch
files.description: Segmented control (pill switch) for selecting among a fixed set of string options.

props.name: options
props.description: Options to display as segments.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Currently selected option value.

files.name: BaseTab
files.description: Single tab button with icon, label, and an active underline indicator.

props.name: label
props.description: Tab label text.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon component rendered beside the label.

props.name: active
props.description: Renders the active underline and dark text colour.

files.name: BaseToast
files.description: Individual toast notification card with type-specific icon and colour, optional action button, and dismiss button.

props.name: toast
props.description: Toast data object with id, message, type, and optional action.

files.name: BaseToastContainer
files.description: Fixed bottom-right container that renders all active toasts from the useToast singleton with TransitionGroup animations.

files.name: BaseToggle
files.description: Toggle switch with label, optional description, and an animated slot that expands/collapses when enabled.

props.name: label
props.description: Primary label text.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional sub-label shown below the primary label.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Toggle state bound via v-model.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls knob and label sizes.

files.name: BaseTree
files.description: Draggable tree list of sections (via vuedraggable) with collapse/expand, settings, duplicate, and delete actions per node.

props.name: nodes
props.description: Array of tree nodes to render; each node may have children for nested lists.

props.name: depth
props.description: Current nesting depth (used internally for recursive rendering).

props.name: group
props.description: vuedraggable group config; defaults to sections group with pull/put enabled.

files.name: BaseUpload
files.description: File upload component with image preview, drag-zone, upload-progress state, and removal; delegates upload to storageService.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label rendered above the upload zone.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: URL of the currently uploaded file.

props.name: type
props.description: Upload mode; image shows a preview, file shows a filename row.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls preview area height.

files.name: ErrorBoundary
files.description: Error boundary wrapper that catches render errors from child sections and displays a fallback UI instead of crashing.

files.name: useEditorActions
files.description: Central composable for all land/section mutations; patches sections in the store and marks editor dirty after every change.

returns.name: updateSectionContent
returns.description: Merges partial content into the section's content object.

returns.name: updateSectionSettings
returns.description: Merges partial settings into the section's settings_json.

returns.name: updateSectionStyleVariant
returns.description: Updates a section's style_variant.

returns.name: restoreSectionSnapshot
returns.type: (sectionId: string, data: { content: unknown; settings_json: unknown; style_variant: string }) => void
returns.description: Restores a section to a previously captured snapshot.

returns.name: updateLandImages
returns.description: Updates the active land's cover and/or avatar image URLs.

returns.name: updateTheme
returns.description: Merges partial theme overrides into the active land's theme.

returns.name: addSection
returns.description: Re-export from useSectionLifecycle.

returns.name: deleteSection
returns.description: Re-export from useSectionLifecycle.

returns.name: duplicateSection
returns.description: Re-export from useSectionLifecycle.

returns.name: reorderSection
returns.description: Re-export from useSectionLifecycle.

files.name: useSectionLifecycle
files.description: Manages section add/delete/duplicate/reorder operations with plan-limit enforcement and storage URL cleanup.

returns.name: addSection
returns.description: Creates and inserts a new section at the given fractional position; enforces plan limits.

returns.name: deleteSection
returns.description: Removes a section and cleans up associated storage URLs.

returns.name: duplicateSection
returns.description: Deep-clones a section and inserts it immediately after the original.

returns.name: reorderSection
returns.description: Updates a section's fractional position key.

files.name: useListActions
files.description: CRUD operations for list items within a list section, using fractional indexing for ordering.

returns.name: addListItem
returns.description: Appends a new link item to the list section.

returns.name: updateListItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, itemId: string, data: Partial<ListItem>) => void
returns.description: Merges partial data into an existing list item.

returns.name: deleteListItem
returns.description: Removes a list item by ID.

returns.name: reorderListItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, itemId: string, newPosition: string) => void
returns.description: Updates the fractional position of a list item.

files.name: useCollectionActions
files.description: CRUD operations for collections and their items within collection/monetize sections, with plan-limit gating.

returns.name: addCollection
returns.description: Adds a new collection to the section (gated by plan limit).

returns.name: updateCollection
returns.type: (sectionId: string, collectionId: string, data: Partial<Collection>) => void
returns.description: Updates a collection's metadata.

returns.name: deleteCollection
returns.description: Removes a collection and all its items.

returns.name: reorderCollection
returns.type: (sectionId: string, collectionId: string, newPosition: string) => void
returns.description: Updates a collection's fractional position.

returns.name: addCollectionItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, collectionId: string, data: Partial<CollectionItem>) => CollectionItem | undefined
returns.description: Appends a new item to a collection (gated by plan limit).

returns.name: updateCollectionItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, collectionId: string, itemId: string, data: Partial<CollectionItem>) => void
returns.description: Updates a collection item's data.

returns.name: deleteCollectionItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, collectionId: string, itemId: string) => void
returns.description: Removes an item from a collection.

returns.name: reorderCollectionItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, collectionId: string, itemId: string, newPosition: string) => void
returns.description: Updates a collection item's fractional position.

files.name: useStoreActions
files.description: CRUD operations for store products and their items within store sections, with plan-limit gating.

returns.name: addStoreItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, storeId: string, data: Pick<StoreItem, 'title' | 'description' | 'image' | 'price' | 'variants' | 'inventory' | 'product_type' | 'file_url'>) => StoreItem | undefined
returns.description: Adds a new product to a store (gated by plan limit).

returns.name: updateStoreItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, storeId: string, itemId: string, data: Partial<StoreItem>) => void
returns.description: Updates a store product's data.

returns.name: deleteStoreItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, storeId: string, itemId: string) => void
returns.description: Removes a product from a store.

returns.name: reorderStoreItem
returns.type: (sectionId: string, storeId: string, itemId: string, newPosition: string) => void
returns.description: Updates a store item's fractional position.

files.name: useCollaboratorActions
files.description: Async operations for team collaborator management: reads from the active land and delegates mutations to collaboratorService.

returns.name: getCollaborators
returns.description: Returns the active land's current collaborators array.

returns.name: invite
returns.description: Sends an invite and appends the new collaborator to the land.

returns.name: updateRole
returns.description: Changes a collaborator's role.

returns.name: remove
returns.description: Removes a collaborator from the land.

returns.name: resendInvite
returns.description: Re-sends the invite email for a pending collaborator.

returns.name: acceptInvite
returns.description: Accepts a pending invite via token.

files.name: useDragSort
files.description: Generic drag-and-drop reordering helper using fractional indexing; wraps vuedraggable drag start/end events.

params.name: getItems
params.description: Returns the current ordered list of positionable items (called after vuedraggable has mutated the array).

params.name: onReorder
params.description: Callback invoked with the dragged item's ID and its newly computed fractional position.

returns.name: isDragging
returns.description: True while a drag operation is in progress.

returns.name: onDragStart
returns.description: Handler to bind to vuedraggable's @start event.

returns.name: onDragEnd
returns.description: Handler to bind to vuedraggable's @end event; calculates and emits the new position.

files.name: useIsMobile
files.description: Reactive mobile breakpoint detection using a resize listener; breakpoint is 1024px.

returns.name: isMobile
returns.description: True when the viewport width is less than 1024px.

files.name: usePlan
files.description: Feature gate and content-limit helpers derived from the active land's plan tier.

returns.name: plan
returns.description: The active land's plan tier.

returns.name: isPaid
returns.description: True when the plan is paid.

returns.name: canUseCollaborators
returns.description: True when the plan allows team collaborators.

returns.name: canUseCampaign
returns.description: True when the plan allows campaign integrations.

returns.name: canUseCustomDomain
returns.description: True when the plan allows custom domain connection.

returns.name: maxSections
returns.description: Maximum content sections allowed (-1 = unlimited).

returns.name: maxCollectionSections
returns.description: Maximum collection/store/monetize sections allowed.

returns.name: maxCollectionsPerSection
returns.description: Maximum collections per collection section.

returns.name: maxItemsPerCollection
returns.description: Maximum items per collection or store.

returns.name: withinSectionLimit
returns.description: Returns true if a new content section can be added.

returns.name: withinCollectionSectionLimit
returns.description: Returns true if another collection-type section can be added.

returns.name: canAddSectionType
returns.description: Returns true if the given section type is allowed on the current plan.

returns.name: withinCollectionLimit
returns.description: Returns true if a new collection can be added to a section.

returns.name: withinItemLimit
returns.description: Returns true if a new item can be added to a collection or store.

files.name: useThemePreset
files.description: Derives boolean flags for the active theme preset to simplify conditional rendering in section components.

returns.name: isMinimalTheme
returns.description: True when the preset is 'minimal' or 'baseline'.

returns.name: isStructureTheme
returns.description: True when the preset is 'structure'.

files.name: useThemeVars
files.description: Watches the theme store and writes CSS custom properties (--theme-main, --theme-accent, --theme-font-title, etc.) to :root.

files.name: useToast
files.description: Module-level singleton toast queue; all callers share the same reactive toasts array.

returns.name: toasts
returns.description: Reactive array of active toast notifications.

returns.name: addToast
returns.type: (message: string, type?: Toast['type'], duration?: number, options?: { persistent?: boolean; action?: Toast['action'] }) => string
returns.description: Adds a toast and auto-removes it after duration ms unless persistent.

returns.name: removeToast
returns.description: Immediately removes a toast by ID.

files.name: land.service
files.description: Supabase-backed service for land CRUD: getMyLands, createLand, save (sections+theme with AbortController), updateLand (metadata), deleteLand.

files.name: auth.service
files.description: Supabase auth service: login, register, verifyOtp, forgotPassword, resetPassword, logout, getSession.

files.name: user.service
files.description: Supabase profile service: getMe, updateMe, deleteAccount.

files.name: storage.service
files.description: Supabase Storage service: upload (auto-converts to WebP), remove, and extractSectionUrls utility.

files.name: stripe.service
files.description: Stripe Connect and billing service via Edge Functions: connectUrl, handleCallback, disconnect, createSubscriptionCheckout, createBillingPortal.

files.name: publish.service
files.description: Publishes a land via Edge Function with exponential backoff retry (500ms → 1s → 1.5s).

files.name: collaborator.service
files.description: Collaborator management via Edge Functions: invite, updateRole, remove, resendInvite, acceptInvite, refuseInvite.

files.name: domain.service
files.description: Custom domain management via Edge Function: connect, disconnect, verify.

files.name: integration.service
files.description: Campaign integration service: saveCampaignIntegration, removeCampaignIntegration, fetchProviderLists.

files.name: land (store)
files.description: Pinia store holding the list of lands, activeLandId, and loading state; provides setLands, setActiveLand, addLand, updateLand, deleteLand.

files.name: editor (store)
files.description: Pinia store for editor state: isEditMode, activeSection, isDirty, hasUnpublishedChanges, land/themeSnapshot; provides enterEditMode, exitEditMode, takeSnapshot, markDirty, markClean, markPublished.

files.name: theme (store)
files.description: Pinia store for the active land's LandTheme; provides setTheme, updateThemeField, clearTheme.

files.name: user (store)
files.description: Pinia store for the current user profile and authentication status; provides setUser, clearUser.

files.name: auth (store)
files.description: Pinia store for auth flow state (isLoading, error, resetEmailSent, passwordResetSuccess); provides setLoading, setError, clearError, $reset.

files.name: appModals (store)
files.description: Pinia store for global modal visibility: activeModal, activeIntegration, dashboardDetail; provides openIntegrations, openDashboardDetail, openUpgrade, close.

files.name: campaign (store)
files.description: Pinia store for the campaign integration editor state; provides setIntegration, clearIntegration.

files.name: router/index
files.description: Vue Router config: defines all routes (/, /auth/*, /dashboard/*, /onboarding, /checkout/*) and a beforeEach guard that enforces auth and redirects new users to onboarding.

files.name: sections/index
files.description: Exports sectionPrimitives array (SectionPrimitive[]) used by the add-section picker, each entry has id (SectionType), label, description, and icon.

files.name: themePresets
files.description: THEME_PRESET_DEFINITIONS map defining font, colour, and style-variant defaults for minimal, baseline, and structure presets.

files.name: sectionDefaults
files.description: SECTION_DEFAULTS map providing default content, settings_json, and style_variant for each SectionType.

files.name: sectionSettingsConfig
files.description: Configuration objects driving the section settings UI — field definitions, labels, and option lists per section type.

files.name: styleVariants
files.description: STYLE_VARIANTS_BY_SECTION map listing the allowed style_variant strings for each SectionType.

files.name: purposeDefaults
files.description: buildSectionContent() seeds realistic default content for new sections based on the land's declared purpose.

files.name: mockSectionContent
files.description: Static mock content fixtures for each section type used during development.

files.name: position
files.description: Fractional indexing helpers: generatePositionAfter, generatePositionBefore, generatePositionBetween, generatePositions, sortByPosition.

files.name: color
files.description: Colour utility functions for hex manipulation and contrast calculations.

files.name: formatting
files.description: Text formatting helpers (truncation, currency, number formatting).

files.name: slug
files.description: URL slug generation and validation utilities.

files.name: favicon
files.description: Extracts a favicon URL from a given website URL.

files.name: videoEmbed
files.description: Parses YouTube and Vimeo URLs and returns embeddable iframe src strings.

files.name: imageFallback
files.description: Returns a placeholder image URL when a given image URL fails to load.

files.name: fonts
files.description: loadGoogleFont() dynamically injects a Google Fonts <link> tag for a given font family.

files.name: markdown
files.description: Parses markdown strings to sanitised HTML using marked and DOMPurify.

files.name: lucideIcons
files.description: LUCIDE_ICONS array of { name, label, group, component } entries used by BaseIconPicker.

files.name: debounce
files.description: Generic debounce utility that delays function execution until after a specified wait.

files.name: supabase
files.description: Initialises and exports the Supabase client singleton using VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_KEY env vars.

files.name: email/index
files.description: Email integration router that dispatches subscribe requests to the correct provider adapter based on the campaign integration type.

files.name: email/types
files.description: Type definitions for email integration payloads and adapter interfaces.

files.name: email/adapters/kit
files.description: Kit (ConvertKit) provider adapter: subscribes an email address to a Kit form via their API.

files.name: email/adapters/loops
files.description: Loops provider adapter: subscribes an email address to a Loops audience.

files.name: email/adapters/brevo
files.description: Brevo (Sendinblue) provider adapter: adds a contact to a Brevo list.

files.name: email/adapters/flodesk
files.description: Flodesk provider adapter: subscribes an email address to a Flodesk segment.

files.name: email/adapters/mailchimp
files.description: Mailchimp provider adapter: adds a subscriber to a Mailchimp audience.

files.name: email/adapters/mailerlite
files.description: MailerLite provider adapter: adds a subscriber to a MailerLite group.

files.name: email/adapters/webhook
files.description: Generic webhook provider adapter: POSTs subscriber data to a user-configured URL.

files.name: mock/generators
files.description: Faker.js-based generators for realistic mock land, section, user, and collaborator data.

files.name: mock/landBuilder
files.description: buildMockLand() and buildMinimalMockLand() factory functions used to seed Pinia stores in development.

files.name: mock/analytics
files.description: Mock analytics data (page views, referrers, device breakdown) for the AnalyticsDetail panel.

files.name: mock/orders
files.description: Mock order data for the OrdersDetail panel.

files.name: mock/monetize
files.description: Mock membership/monetization data for the MonetizeDetail panel.

files.name: mock/provider
files.description: Mock campaign provider data for the CampaignDetail panel.
